info.title: CourseHub API
info.description: Complete API documentation for CourseHub platform

post.description: Send an email with a link to reset the password.
Authenticate the user using email and password and issue an access token.

delete.description: Revoke all access tokens for an authenticated user.
Revoke the current access token for an authenticated user.

post.description: Register a new user and issue an access token.
Resend the email verification notification to the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve a cached and paginated list of courses with filters and sorting.

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search courses by title or description

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort courses by field. Use "-" prefix for descending order

get.description: Retrieve a list of lessons for a specific course.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort lessons by field. Use "-" prefix for descending order

post.description: Create a new lesson for a specific course.

get.description: Retrieve a specific lesson for a specific course.

put.description: Update a specific lesson for a specific course.

delete.description: Delete a specific lesson from a specific course.

ForgotPasswordRequest.title: Forgot Password Request
ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Request payload for sending password reset link.

LoginUserRequest.title: Login User Request
LoginUserRequest.description: Request payload for authenticating a user.

remember.description: Remember me flag of the user.

RegisterUserRequest.title: Register User Request
RegisterUserRequest.description: Request payload for registering a new user.

password_confirmation.description: Password confirmation of the user. (must match password)
Password confirmation of the user. (must match password)

token.description: Password reset token received via email.

AuthResponse.title: Auth Response
AuthResponse.description: Data returned after user login or registration.

access_token.description: Personal access token for API authentication.

token_type.description: Token type to be used in the Authorization header.

email_verified_at.description: Time of the email verified at.

StoreCourseRequest.title: Store Course Request
StoreCourseRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new course.

title.description: The title of the new course

slug.description: The slug of the new course

description.description: The description of the new course

type.description: The type of the new course

price.description: The price of the new course

UpdateCourseImageRequest.title: Update Course Image Request
UpdateCourseImageRequest.description: Request payload for updating a course image.

image.description: The image file. Allowed formats: jpg, jpeg, png, webp. Max size: 2048 KB.

UpdateCourseRequest.title: Update course request schema
UpdateCourseRequest.description: Schema for updating an existing course via API request

Author.title: Author Schema
Author.description: Details of a author returned by the API

author_id.description: Author unique identifier of the course

StoreLessonRequest.title: Store Lesson Request
StoreLessonRequest.description: Schema for creating a lesson depending on course type

UpdateLessonRequest.title: Update Lesson Request
UpdateLessonRequest.description: Schema for updating a lesson depending on course type

created_at.description: The creation date of the lesson

updated_at.description: The modification date of the lesson

Lesson.title: Lesson schema
Lesson.description: Details of a lesson returned by the API

OfflineLesson.title: Offline lesson schema
OfflineLesson.description: Offline content of a lesson returned by the API

start_time.description: The start time of the lesson

end_time.description: The end time of the lesson

room_number.description: The room number of the lesson

OnlineLesson.title: Online lesson schema
OnlineLesson.description: Online content of a lesson returned by the API

start_time.description: The start time of the lesson

end_time.description: The end time of the lesson

VideoLesson.title: Video lesson schema
VideoLesson.description: Video content of a lesson returned by the API

per_page.description: The number of items per page
